item.title: If you give a politician $5 to influence a vote, it’s bribery.If billionaires spend $50 million to influence an election, it’s legal.That is what a corrupt campaign finance system looks like.

item.title: Memes vol 688 Girl Dump
item.description:
If science could find a way to do this to get rid of the microplastics that would be sick as hell
I’d get too lonely so I’d have my boyfriend and my best friend and at least 6 cats
Bruce tax
Gertie tax
Froggy tax
Liza Jane and Scruffy tax
Nessie tax

item.dc:creator: Tapthisbong

item.title: Dumpscilla: Queen of the Desert
item.description:
Looking for more terms like this
Bloodthirsty bastards!
Turn on the red alert so we can chase the dot
That’s why I gave up, it’s too risky to be important. People might ask you to do more things
Been to a few of these, they sink into memory like a discarded tool into the muck
Keep dancing to it and it’ll make sense eventually
The idyllic world they stole from us
I did not mean to put these together to imply any sense of otherness. I try to share precolonial spaces to remind us of the options for community. I shudder to think that in the cruel pursuit of resources we have erased wisdoms and voices. Not to say any society was without deep flaws, which we should also learn from. Anyway, just daydreaming about the shapes of societies.
And other shapes
Right… I’m awake airman. No, no water bottle, just dry electrolyte packets. Just think of it as a pixie stick.
Salt their fields!
Is there a version where it’s not all melancholic sorrow?
Perfect.
We must imagine Sisyphus happy, because it’s either that or realize we are morally obligated to build a catapult for the boulder and launch it at Zeus. Or maybe a trebuchet, this is why I can’t do this alone, im not an engineer
I’m this thing, just a sheet thrown over some disillusioned stage hand, trying not to show my tennis shoes
My alarms bouncing off me sleeping
Plod along with me
It’s deliberate
Rewilding is a neat concept
I bet he smokes reds
They let me in no problem. Just use my library card.
I have an old cat picture like this. Maybe it’ll make the tax one day.
Important artifacts
Dani Moonstar is awesome
Kinda what work feels like
We’ve done this all before
Cities come and go
As man reshapes the world
Here’s the thing
It can also be a dump terminating image
Before taxes, of course
item.dc:creator: vagrantvigilantepunk

item.title: A small tribute to the strong girls
item.description:
Lorena Abreu
Jade Miura
Athena Grimes in workout clothes
Athena in cosplay and makeup
LilBigNanc
Carriejune Bowlby (featured in that famously dumb "if you're attracted to her you're gay" post)
Jessica Shen
Fitness trainer Andreia Brazier
Lorena Abreu from the first pic, showing what she can do with her muscles and fitness.
item.dc:creator: TheOneYouWereWarnedAbout

item.title: My wife pushed me to try something new
item.description: I was really making a mountain out of a molehill, just like when I got into wearing leggings, which are now my default. My wife wanted both of us to go out in cute dresses, but I got into the mental loop of I want to but I'm scared to but I want to. We ended up going ro the car and I wasn't wearing a dress, but I broke down crying and my wife convinced me to come back upstairs and get changed. One private private breakdown and a complete reapplication of makeup, and i came back down smiling and feeling fine! Edit: Thanks for all the kind words everyone, especially those of you praising my wife. ❤️ I went out clothes shopping with her a little after posting, still in the dress and a full face of makeup that time and felt more confident in my femininity than ever. Unfortunately, I found exactly 0 articles of clothing I liked, which put a huge damper on my mood until a girl at a thrift store complimented both our dresses and asked us for an opinion on a dress she had picked out. The molehill has been conquered for now, but I'll take another stab at it soon! My dress did not have pockets but I have a big purse for a reason ?
item.dc:creator: MacroMoray

item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: Sunday scaries? Not anymore!
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Yay for female friends to keep us sane
Would appreciate this, actually
I had forgotten what that meant. People forget that babies are born knowing nothing about this world, and that teens definitely don't know old references.
Can confirm
Ever heard court transcriptions? Hilarious
Yay!
I too, do not care for a large orange destroying my city. Luckily, I live in a boring state so nothing attacks my capital. We all know monsters only attack LA and NYC
OMG this is the dumbest thing I've ever seen
They both had lap pinkies
It's like they're inside my head
I liked the romance but I've never actually read the book. I only read the trilogy.
Oops, the internet got me again
Too perfect to add anything
Legend says he died waiting for the ice cream machine to be repaired
Tis but a scratch
They're just making their life more magical
Wow, learn something new every day
Only Dr Pepper
I would quit
Creating repeat business
Being a mom has been the same for decades
The kid is the gate opener
She's a nurturer
It's funny that all adults feel this way but expect more from other adults
Sounds good. I would like mine to be a temporary.
I would have to change this every day. My son's aim isn't great.
What a Herculean task
I didn't buy myself chips because I need to eat better. I hate myself. I want chips.
Yes yes, I'm hot mess
Umm, what?
Wow, hadn't thought about whether or not gods were gay
I feel weird. Like, I know this existed in my lifetime but I had forgotten about it. Unlocked a memory.
Knowing how to use a rotary phone. Barely made it to the earth in time to need this skill. My kids saw one in an antique store last week but didn't know what it was at all.
Yeah, I rarely use it for juice. Cat vomit though, nearly every day.
Just do everything exactly the way I want and I'm totally chill
Clark the Aardvark
I would've thought Oktoberfest would be a prime cheese holiday
Sounds like my kind of theme park
How dare it
That would be an awesome gift
I think it's amazing
Ice cream is essential for mental health
Nice security system
Genius
Oh look, different options. But if you had an orange cat, would you get an orange couch?
Sounds like a steal in this economy
Yes
Damn it, Barbie! You know I just had a rough day destroying the galaxy! All I want is a beer waiting for me. All you have is every job known up mankind. Would it be so hard for you to have hot food waiting for me? Geez.
She lives on Sesame Street. Can't she live with Big Bird?
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: 22 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 266
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Leigh McGowan (@iampoliticsgirl): "This government is putting us in so much danger"
item.description: I've been wondering why one of Trump's favorite deportation destinations was the Congo. Also wondering about those flights and DHS-ICE/military types that made them. They have been temporarily paused as of May 21, 2026 (supposedly), probably nothing to worry about, but if it was anyone else they'd be denied entry for 30 days.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Random library meme dump
item.description: The library related content that you'll love
item.dc:creator: jacobblanck2000

item.title: Leaving the good ‘ol US of A
item.description: While the sample size was just 1,000 people, [researchers] noted that the findings were a striking contrast to previous iterations of the same poll; from 2014 onwards, the number of women in the US who said they wanted to leave had soared fourfold. When it came to young men, however, the numbers had held steady at around 19%, giving rise to what [researchers] described as the widest recorded gender divide of any country polled. Source: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2026/may/19/us-women-migrating-europe-politics
item.dc:creator: BigBlueWonder

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone, we're all excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
The Pucketts are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1st by Pizza Angel @NeelyAdkins 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 5th by @OP 6th, 7th and 8th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 9th, 10th, 11th and 12th by @OP 13th, 14th and 15th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 16th, 17th and 18th by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 19th and 20th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 21st by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @irvingschwinglepuck 27th, 28yh, 29th and 30th by @OP 31st, 32nd and 33rd by Pizza Angel @Jennytornado 34th and 35th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen ... Today's Grocery Tally 1st by Grocery Angel @NeelyAdkins
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Time magic is a blessing and a curse
item.description:
This is an edited (shortened and sped up with different music) version of this video by Eva Figueroa. https://www.instagram.com/_evafigueroa_/reel/DAYlCgPhKFU/ The original version is definitely worth checking. I would have included it here, but the length of the original video is too long to upload. Animator's Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/_evafigueroa_/
Here's some character info from the artist for those interested in knowing more about them.

item.title: Never forget Trump stole documents on confidential informants in January, 2021.
item.description: 9 Months later, CIA Counterintelligence sent a top secret cable warning an unusual number of confidential informants had been killed, captured or compromised.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas
